rules.message: Layer {from} must not import {to}; common code must stay below feature layers.
Layer {from} must not import {to}; language code must stay UI/workbench independent.
Layer {from} must not import {to}; terminal code must not depend on editor/workbench internals.
Layer editor must not import workbench; workbench may compose editor, not the reverse.
Layer workbench must not import deep editor internals directly; route shared contracts through common modules.
Layer {from} must not import {to}; runtime glue must not own UI feature internals.
